reference_block.name: bindings
reference_block.title: Bindings
reference_block.statement: Bindings allow Workers to interact with Cloudflare Developer Platform resources and are accessed through env, WorkerEntrypoint class properties or the cloudflare:workers env import.
Inside Workers, bindings generally provide better performance and fewer restrictions than REST APIs, which are intended for non-Worker applications.

checklist.entry: Use secrets or Secrets Store bindings for sensitive values.
Do not store sensitive values in plaintext vars.
Secrets are accessed like other environment variables in Worker code, but their values are not visible after definition in Wrangler or the dashboard.
Use either .dev.vars or .env for local development in one configuration path.
